calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Daniel P. Dean, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Taravat Talepasand.
Plaintiff Taravat Talepasand sworn ane examined on her own behalf.
Declarations submitted withe exhibits reviewed and admitted in evidence.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Danielle Andrea Purdy.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-30 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $544,387.59
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,205.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $545,593.39
Judgment signed in open court.
